Pump.fun scanner for fresh Solana launches

Use SlimeWire to find fresh launch movement, open chart context, review visible token signals, and hand off alerts between the web terminal and Telegram.

Open scannerOpen @SlimeWiredBot

Scanner workflow

Fresh pair feed

Find new Solana launches and sort by movement, age, and market context.

MC and liquidity

Fresh coins need quick reads on size, pool depth, and tradeability.

Token checks

Metadata, links, social context, authority notes, and warnings help reduce blind clicks.

Chart plus txns

Open chart and transaction views to inspect real flow.

Preset trade plan

Amount, slippage, TP/SL, timer, and sell size belong near the scan.

Telegram handoff

Groups and mobile users can use @SlimeWiredBot for alerts and fast actions.

FAQ

What should a pump.fun scanner show?

A pump.fun scanner should show fresh launch age, market cap, liquidity, volume, chart context, token metadata, social links, and visible warnings when available.

Why use Telegram alerts with a scanner?

Fresh launches move quickly, so Telegram alerts help users react from mobile or group chats while the web terminal provides deeper chart context.

Does SlimeWire guarantee safe pump.fun trades?

No. SlimeWire surfaces live data and risk context, but trading fresh Solana launches remains risky.
